title: chore(deps): update ai sdk
summary: Automated Renovate PR that bumps multiple AI SDK packages across the monorepo: @ai-sdk/anthropic, @ai-sdk/google, @ai-sdk/groq, @ai-sdk/openai, @ai-sdk/xai, @ai-sdk/gateway, @ai-sdk/provider, @ai-sdk/provider-utils, @ai-sdk/togetherai, @ai-sdk/react, and the core 'ai' package. Updates span v5 and v6 lines across 21 files (mostly package.json + pnpm-lock.yaml). Includes auto-generated changesets for @mastra/agent-builder and @mastra/core.
maintainerNotes: PR has merge conflicts (mergeableState: CONFLICTING) and several CI checks are failing (Agent Builder Tests, Core Package Tests, E2E Tests, Full Test Suite, Memory Tests). Reviews are all from github-actions bot (auto-approvals), not human reviewers. A related major version PR (#12999) is also open. The Renovate body notes versions are already pending further updates. Needs rebase to resolve conflicts, then CI failures should be investigated. Consider whether #12999 (major) supersedes this one.
